title: Workflow backend request (contract/v1)
description: The JSON document orun streams to the workflow engine's stdin in `backend` mode. Vendored identically in sourceplane/orun and sourceplane/torkflow; both CIs run conformance against the same fixtures. A wire change is a new contract version, never an edit to this file.

contract.description: Contract version. Both sides reject unknown values with a versioned error.

workflow.description: Path to the torkflow/v1 workflow file to execute.

with.description: Declared inputs, handed to the engine as the workflow's Trigger context.

connections.description: Resolved credential payloads keyed by the workflow's own connection names. The engine fans each payload to steps referencing `connection: <name>`, bypassing its file registry. Values never persist on either side.

metadata.description: Run context: jobId/component/environment/step for a plan step; hook id for a blueprint hook.

runDir.description: Scratch directory for the engine's own run state. An input to sealing, never the durable record.

actionStores.description: Optional action-store directories the engine should load provider modules from. Omitted: the engine applies its own default resolution.

resume.description: Reserved (WX6): when true, re-execute only steps that did not succeed in the prior run recorded under runDir.
